case_title: COLINDRES, ROSA VS FLORES, JUAN ALVARO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN ALVARO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY COLINDRES, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN ALVARO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-18-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES FOR TOTAL AMOUNT OF $956.00. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE TO 11/17/04 @ 10:00AM. IF NO APPEARANCE ON 11/17/04, DISMISS CASE W/ PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-18-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-17-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES. IF NO APPEARANCE ON 11/17/04 @ 10 AM, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLINDRES, ROSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, JUAN ALVARO $256.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $278.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDANT DID NOT FULLY COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
